economic_notes: Nation owns 8.25% of Prince Albert First Nations Business Development LP and 8.33% of Prince Albert Development Corporation. Lionel Head Memorial Store (Red Earth Cree Developments Inc.) operated as a consolidated entity. Nation is member of Prince Albert Grand Council (12 Nations).
notes: Fiscal year end is March 31, 2023 but audit report is dated September 24, 2024 — significant delay. Comparative 2022 figures are restated (see note 23, not fully included in extracted text). Four consolidated entities: Operations, Section 95 Social Housing, Health Service, and Red Earth Cree Developments Inc. (Lionel Head Memorial Store). Two government business enterprises accounted for under modified equity method: Prince Albert Development Corporation and Prince Albert First Nations Business Development LP. Total government transfers estimated as ISC ($29,203,326) + PAGC ($1,522,134) + CMHC ($306,405) + First Nations Trust ($726,315) + Canadian Heritage ($293,150) + Northern Lights Community Development Corp ($106,535) + Ottawa Trust Fund ($3,553) = $32,161,418. OSR calculated as total revenue ($43,241,278) minus total government transfers ($32,161,418) = $11,079,860. Schedule of remuneration not included in extracted text. Note 15 appears truncated in source document.
